creator: freebsd.tug890@passmail.net
text:
I updated these ports and qBittorrent-nox11 is starting fine now. 
Upgrade of qt4-qmake-4.8.6 to qt4-qmake-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-moc-4.8.6 to qt4-moc-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-rcc-4.8.6 to qt4-rcc-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-uic-4.8.6 to qt4-uic-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-corelib-4.8.6_5 to qt4-corelib-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-network-4.8.6_1 to qt4-network-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-xml-4.8.6_1 to qt4-xml-4.8.7
Upgrade of qt4-linguisttools-4.8.6 to qt4-linguisttools-4.8.7
